overall.description: Dashcam footage of night driving on a rain-soaked highway with active windshield wipers. The vehicle navigates winding roads with metal guardrails and occasional traffic, illuminated only by headlights reflecting off the wet asphalt surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked highway curve with metal guardrails

agents.ego_description: driving cautiously through highway curves with windshield wipers active, navigating wet road conditions

entered.detail: yellow diamond-shaped warning sign indicating curve ahead, mounted on right side of road
continuous metal guardrail running along the right side of the highway
rain-soaked asphalt surface reflecting headlight beams

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a dark, rain-soaked highway curve illuminated by headlights. Metal guardrails line the right side while yellow warning signs indicate upcoming turns. The wet asphalt reflects the lights, and distant oncoming traffic headlights are visible ahead.

events.description: blue sedan passes by on the left side in the opposite lane

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed while a vehicle passes on the left, continuing through the wet curve

notable_agents.action: blue sedan traveling in the opposite direction passes by the ego vehicle on the left

segments.scene_description: A blue sedan passes by on the left in the opposite lane as the vehicle continues through the rainy highway curve. The guardrails remain visible on the right, closer now, while the road surface glistens with rain under the headlights.

events.description: approaching and following a vehicle with illuminated red taillights ahead

agents.ego_description: following a vehicle ahead on the winding wet road, maintaining safe following distance

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with illuminated brake lights moving in the same direction on the wet highway

entered.detail: another yellow curve warning sign appearing on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle follows a car with bright red taillights ahead on the rain-soaked highway. Guardrails are visible on both sides as the road curves, and the windshield wipers continue to clear the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with moderate traffic and curves

events.description: overtaking or passing a slower vehicle on the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic on the rainy highway, passing slower vehicles while maintaining control on wet curves

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with bright taillights traveling in the same direction
vehicle being overtaken on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle encounters moderate traffic on the final stretch, overtaking a vehicle on the right while following another car ahead. The highway continues to curve through the dark, rainy night with guardrails visible and headlights cutting through the downpour.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a dark, rain-soaked highway that transitions from a solitary curve into a stretch of moderate nighttime traffic. It begins by navigating a winding road where headlights reflect off the glistening asphalt and yellow warning signs mark the path beside metal guardrails. As the vehicle continues through the curve, a blue sedan passes in the opposite lane before the camera settles behind a car with bright red taillights. The scene then shifts as the road tightens with guardrails on both sides, while windshield wipers continuously clear the heavy downpour. Finally, the movement expands into a more crowded flow of traffic, overtaking one vehicle while following another through the dark, rainy night.
